parameters.jsCode:
const body = $json.body ?? $json;
const required = ['parent_name', 'email', 'phone', 'child_age_group', 'timeline', 'preferred_campus'];
const missing = required.filter((key) => !String(body[key] ?? '').trim());
const nameParts = String(body.parent_name ?? '').trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
const firstName = nameParts.shift() ?? '';
const lastName = nameParts.join(' ');
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const campusDirectory = {
  'Cascades': { address: '21290 Springlake Ct, Sterling, VA 20166', phone: '+17034308657' },
  'Gainesville': { address: '14130 Glenkirk Rd, Gainesville, VA 20155', phone: '+17037540946' },
  'One Loudoun': { address: '44799 Saranac St, Ashburn, VA 20147', phone: '+17039555337' },
  'South Riding': { address: '25235 Elk Lick Rd, South Riding, VA 20152', phone: '+17033272003' },
  'Karter Little Wins': { address: '43244 Hay Rd, Ashburn, VA 20147', phone: '+17035745113' },
  'Parker': { address: '19920 Hilltop Rd, Parker, CO 80134', phone: '+17204461861' },
  'Thornton': { address: '4155 E. 128th Ave., Thornton, CO 80241', phone: '+17204460177' },
};
const campusName = String(body.preferred_campus ?? '').trim();
const campusMeta = campusDirectory[campusName] ?? { address: String(body.campus_address ?? '').trim(), phone: String(body.campus_phone ?? '').trim() };
const normalized = {
  valid: missing.length === 0,
  error: missing.length ? `Missing required fields: ${missing.join(', ')}` : '',
  source: 'karter-schools-landing-page',
  submitted_at: body.submitted_at || now,
  parent_name: String(body.parent_name ?? '').trim(),
  first_name: firstName,
  last_name: lastName,
  email: String(body.email ?? '').trim().toLowerCase(),
  phone: String(body.phone ?? '').trim(),
  child_age_group: String(body.child_age_group ?? '').trim(),
  timeline: String(body.timeline ?? '').trim(),
  preferred_time: String(body.preferred_time ?? '').trim(),
  preferred_campus: campusName,
  campus_address: campusMeta.address || '',
  campus_phone: campusMeta.phone || '',
  message: String(body.message ?? '').trim(),
  consent: String(body.consent ?? '').trim(),
  landing_url: String(body.landing_url ?? '').trim(),
  page_title: String(body.page_title ?? '').trim(),
  referrer: String(body.referrer ?? '').trim(),
  utm_source: String(body.utm_source ?? '').trim(),
  utm_medium: String(body.utm_medium ?? '').trim(),
  utm_campaign: String(body.utm_campaign ?? '').trim(),
  utm_content: String(body.utm_content ?? '').trim(),
  utm_term: String(body.utm_term ?? '').trim(),
  tags: ['Karter', campusName || 'Unknown Campus', 'Website Lead'],
  lead_id: `karter-${Date.now()}`,
  ghl_enabled: Boolean($env.GHL_API_KEY),
};

normalized.ghl_payload = {
  firstName: normalized.first_name || normalized.parent_name,
  lastName: normalized.last_name,
  name: normalized.parent_name,
  email: normalized.email,
  phone: normalized.phone,
  source: normalized.source,
  tags: normalized.tags,
  customFields: [
    { key: 'child_age_group', field_value: normalized.child_age_group },
    { key: 'timeline', field_value: normalized.timeline },
    { key: 'preferred_time', field_value: normalized.preferred_time },
    { key: 'preferred_campus', field_value: normalized.preferred_campus },
    { key: 'campus_address', field_value: normalized.campus_address },
    { key: 'campus_phone', field_value: normalized.campus_phone },
    { key: 'landing_url', field_value: normalized.landing_url },
    { key: 'utm_source', field_value: normalized.utm_source },
    { key: 'utm_medium', field_value: normalized.utm_medium },
    { key: 'utm_campaign', field_value: normalized.utm_campaign },
    { key: 'message', field_value: normalized.message }
  ]
};

return [{ json: normalized }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, leadId: $json.lead_id, campus: $json.preferred_campus, ghl: $json.ghl_status || 'sent', message: 'Lead received' } }}
